subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What was the first capital of Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान की पहली राजधानी क्या थी?
explanation_en: Amber Fort, located in Jaipur, was the first capital of Rajasthan when it was formed as a princely state in 1876.
